message.content:
Read the following files in full and return their complete contents:
1. /Users/ryanvasquez/Desktop/App Dev/reading-tracker/components/DetailModal.tsx
2. /Users/ryanvasquez/Desktop/App Dev/reading-tracker/types/index.ts (or wherever the Quote type is defined)

Return the complete file contents verbatim.

content.text: I'll read those files for you.

content.content:
1→'use client' 2→ 3→import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from 'react' 4→import { format, parseISO } from 'date-fns' 5→import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase' 6→import OutlineEditor from './OutlineEditor' 7→import Quotes from './Quotes' 8→import LinkQuoteModal from './LinkQuoteModal' 9→import NoteRenderer from './NoteRenderer' 10→import type { Book, Quote } from '@/types' 11→ 12→type Tab = 'outline' | 'brainstorm' | 'quotes' 13→type SaveStatus = 'idle' | 'saving' | 'saved' 14→ 15→interface Props { 16→ bookId: string 17→ initialTab?: Tab 18→ onClose: () => void 19→ onDelete: (id: string) => void 20→ onUpdate: () => void 21→} 22→ 23→const inputClass = 'w-full bg-fog-100 border border-fog-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm text-navy-900 placeholder:text-fog-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-navy-500/20 transition-all' 24→const labelClass = 'block text-xs font-medium text-fog-600 mb-1' 25→ 26→export default function DetailModal({ bookId, initialTab = 'outline', onClose, onDelete, onUpdate }: Props) { 27→ const [book, setBook] = useState(null) 28→ const [notes, setNotes] = useState({ outline: '', scratch: '' }) 29→ const [quotes, setQuotes] = useState([]) 30→ const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true) 31→ const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(initialTab) 32→ const [saveStatus, setSaveStatus] = useState('idle') 33→ const [editing, setEditing] = useState(false) 34→ const [confirmDelete, setConfirmDelete] = useState(false) 35→ const [savingMeta, setSavingMeta] = useState(false) 36→ const [metaError, setMetaError] = useState('') 37→ 38→ // Edit form state 39→ const [editTitle, setEditTitle] = useState('') 40→ const [editAuthor, setEditAuthor] = useState('') 41→ const [editTotalPages, setEditTotalPages] = useState('') 42→ const [editCurrentPage, setEditCurrentPage] = useState('') 43→ const [editPublication, setEditPublication] = useState('') 44→ const [editArticleDate, setEditArticleDate] = useState('') 45→ const [editShowTitle, setEditShowTitle] = useState('') 46→ const [editGuests, setEditGuests] = useState('') 47→ const [editAirDate, setEditAirDate] = useState('') 48→ 49→ const saveTimer = useRef | null>(null) 50→ 51→ // Note editor mode (edit = textarea, preview = rendered with chips) 52→ const [outlineMode, setOutlineMode] = useState<'edit' | 'preview'>('edit') 53→ const [scratchMode, setScratchMode] = useState<'edit' | 'preview'>('edit') 54→ 55→ // Textarea refs for cursor-position capture 56→ const outlineRef = useRef(null) 57→ const scratchRef = useRef(null) 58→ 59→ // Link Quote modal 60→ const [showLinkModal, setShowLinkModal] = useState(false) 61→ const pendingInsert = useRef<{ tab: 'outline' | 'scratch'; pos: number } | null>(null) 62→ 63→ function openLinkModal(tab: 'outline' | 'scratch') { 64→ const el = tab === 'outline' ? outlineRef.current : scratchRef.current 65→ pendingInsert.current = { tab, pos: el?.selectionStart ?? (tab === 'outline' ? notes.outline : notes.scratch).length } 66→ setShowLinkModal(true) 67→ } 68→ 69→ function handleInsertQuoteLink(quoteId: string) { 70→ if (!pendingInsert.current) return 71→ const { tab, pos } = pendingInsert.current 72→ const key = tab === 'outline' ? 'outline' : 'scratch' 73→ const current = notes[key] 74→ const tag = `[quote:${quoteId}]` 75→ handleNoteChange(tab, current.slice(0, pos) + tag + current.slice(pos)) 76→ setShowLinkModal(false) 77→ pendingInsert.current = null 78→ } 79→ 80→ const load = useCallback(async () => { 81→ setLoading(true) 82→ const [bookRes, notesRes, quotesRes] = await Promise.all([ 83→ supabase.from('books').select('*').eq('id', bookId).single(), 84→ supabase.from('book_notes').select('*').eq('book_id', bookId), 85→ supabase.from('quotes').select('*').eq('book_id', bookId) 86→ .order('page_number', { ascending: true, nullsFirst: false }) 87→ .order('created_at', { ascending: true }), 88→ ]) 89→ 90→ if (!bookRes.error && bookRes.data) { 91→ const b = bookRes.data as Book 92→ setBook(b) 93→ setEditTitle(b.title ?? '') 94→ setEditAuthor(b.author ?? '') 95→ setEditTotalPages(b.total_pages?.toString() ?? '') 96→ setEditCurrentPage(b.current_page?.toString() ?? '') 97→ setEditPublication(b.publication ?? '') 98→ setEditArticleDate(b.article_date ?? '') 99→ setEditShowTitle(b.show_title ?? '') 100→ setEditGuests(b.guests ?? '') 101→ setEditAirDate(b.air_date ?? '') 102→ } 103→ 104→ const notesMap: Record = {} 105→ for (const note of notesRes.data ?? []) { 106→ notesMap[note.tab] = note.content 107→ } 108→ setNotes({ outline: notesMap.outline ?? '', scratch: notesMap.scratch ?? '' }) 109→ setQuotes((quotesRes.data ?? []).map(q => ({ ...q, tags: q.tags ?? [] })) as Quote[]) 110→ setLoading(false) 111→ }, [bookId]) 112→ 113→ useEffect(() => { load() }, [load]) 114→ 115→ // Update tab when initialTab changes (from URL navigation) 116→ useEffect(() => { setActiveTab(initialTab) }, [initialTab]) 117→ 118→ // Close on Escape 119→ useEffect(() => { 120→ function onKey(e: KeyboardEvent) { 121→ if (e.key === 'Escape') { 122→ if (editing) { setEditing(false); setConfirmDelete(false); setMetaError('') } 123→ else onClose() 124→ } 125→ } 126→ window.addEventListener('keydown', onKey) 127→ return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey) 128→ }, [onClose, editing]) 129→ 130→ function handleNoteChange(tab: 'outline' | 'scratch', content: string) { 131→ setNotes(n => ({ ...n, [tab]: content })) 132→ setSaveStatus('saving') 133→ if (saveTimer.current) clearTimeout(saveTimer.current) 134→ saveTimer.current = setTimeout(async () => { 135→ await supabase 136→ .from('book_notes') 137→ .upsert({ book_id: bookId, tab, content }, { onConflict: 'book_id,tab' }) 138→ setSaveStatus('saved') 139→ setTimeout(() => setSaveStatus('idle'), 2500) 140→ }, 600) 141→ } 142→ 143→ async function handleSaveMetadata() { 144→ if (!book) return 145→ setSavingMeta(true) 146→ setMetaError('') 147→ 148→ const updates: Record = { 149→ title: editTitle.trim() || book.title, 150→ author: editAuthor.trim() || null, 151→ } 152→ 153→ if (book.type === 'book') { 154→ updates.total_pages = editTotalPages ? Number(editTotalPages) : null 155→ updates.current_page = editCurrentPage ? Number(editCurrentPage) : null 156→ } else if (book.type === 'article') { 157→ updates.publication = editPublication.trim() || null 158→ updates.article_date = editArticleDate.trim() || null 159→ } else if (book.type === 'podcast') { 160→ updates.show_title = editShowTitle.trim() || null 161→ updates.guests = editGuests.trim() || null 162→ updates.air_date = editAirDate.trim() || null 163→ } 164→ 165→ console.log('[DetailModal] saving metadata for book', bookId, updates) 166→ 167→ const res = await fetch(`/api/books/${bookId}`, { 168→ method: 'PATCH', 169→ headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, 170→ body: JSON.stringify(updates), 171→ }) 172→ 173→ const json = await res.json() 174→ setSavingMeta(false) 175→ 176→ if (!res.ok) { 177→ console.error('[DetailModal] save failed:', json) 178→ setMetaError(json.error ?? 'Save failed — check server logs for details.') 179→ return // keep edit form open 180→ } 181→ 182→ console.log('[DetailModal] save succeeded:', json) 183→ setBook(json as Book) 184→ onUpdate() 185→ setEditing(false) 186→ setConfirmDelete(false) 187→ } 188→ 189→ async function handleDelete() { 190→ await supabase.from('books').delete().eq('id', bookId) 191→ onDelete(bookId) 192→ } 193→ 194→ async function handleExportPDF() { 195→ const res = await fetch(`/api/export/pdf/${bookId}`) 196→ if (!res.ok) return 197→ const blob = await res.blob() 198→ const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob) 199→ const a = document.createElement('a') 200→ a.href = url 201→ a.download = `${book?.title ?? 'notes'}.pdf` 202→ a.click() 203→ URL.revokeObjectURL(url) 204→ } 205→ 206→ const TABS: { key: Tab; label: string }[] = [ 207→ { key: 'outline', label: 'Outline' }, 208→ { key: 'brainstorm', label: 'Brainstorm' }, 209→ { key: 'quotes', label: `Quotes${quotes.length > 0 ? ` (${quotes.length})` : ''}` }, 210→ ] 211→ 212→ // Type badge 213→ function typeBadge(type: string) { 214→ if (type === 'article') return 'bg-navy-100 text-navy-700 border-navy-200' 215→ if (type === 'podcast') return 'bg-ember-100 text-ember-700 border-ember-200' 216→ return 'bg-fog-100 text-fog-600 border-fog-300' 217→ } 218→ function typeLabel(type: string) { 219→ if (type === 'article') return '📰 Article' 220→ if (type === 'podcast') return '🎙️ Podcast' 221→ return '📚 Book' 222→ } 223→ 224→ function renderMetadataDisplay() { 225→ if (!book) return null 226→ const subtitle: string[] = [] 227→ if (book.type === 'book') { 228→ if (book.total_pages) subtitle.push(`${book.current_page ?? 0} / ${book.total_pages} pages`) 229→ } else if (book.type === 'article') { 230→ if (book.publication) subtitle.push(book.publication) 231→ if (book.article_date) subtitle.push(book.article_date) 232→ } else if (book.type === 'podcast') { 233→ if (book.show_title) subtitle.push(book.show_title) 234→ if (book.air_date) subtitle.push(book.air_date) 235→ } 236→ 237→ return ( 238→

1→export type BookStatus = 'active' | 'completed' | 'paused' | 'queued'
     2→export type BookType = 'book' | 'article' | 'podcast'
     3→export type NoteTab = 'outline' | 'scratch'
     4→
     5→export interface Book {
     6→  id: string
     7→  title: string
     8→  type: BookType
     9→  author: string | null
    10→  // Book-specific
    11→  current_page: number | null
    12→  total_pages: number | null
    13→  // Article-specific
    14→  publication: string | null
    15→  article_date: string | null
    16→  // Podcast-specific
    17→  show_title: string | null
    18→  guests: string | null
    19→  air_date: string | null
    20→  // Common
    21→  sessions_per_week: number | null
    22→  sort_order: number | null
    23→  status: BookStatus
    24→  date_finished: string | null // YYYY-MM-DD
    25→  created_at: string
    26→  updated_at: string
    27→}
    28→
    29→export interface BookNote {
    30→  id: string
    31→  book_id: string
    32→  tab: NoteTab
    33→  content: string
    34→  updated_at: string
    35→}
    36→
    37→export interface Quote {
    38→  id: string
    39→  book_id: string
    40→  quote_text: string
    41→  page_number: number | null
    42→  tags: string[]
    43→  heading_id: string | null
    44→  sort_order: number | null
    45→  created_at: string
    46→}
    47→
    48→export interface Connection {
    49→  id: string
    50→  source_type: 'quote' | 'note'
    51→  source_id: string
    52→  target_type: 'quote' | 'note'
    53→  target_id: string
    54→  note: string | null
    55→  created_at: string
    56→  // joined
    57→  target_book?: Book
    58→  target_quote?: Quote
    59→  target_note?: BookNote
    60→}
    61→
    62→// Search result types
    63→export type SearchResultType = 'quote' | 'note'
    64→
    65→export interface SearchResult {
    66→  type: SearchResultType
    67→  id: string
    68→  bookId: string
    69→  bookTitle: string
    70→  content: string
    71→  tags?: string[]
    72→  pageNumber?: number | null
    73→  tab?: NoteTab
    74→}
